resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This is broad reference-panel context only. It is not a precise map coordinate, homeland, nationality, community label, migration path, or identity statement.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Map coordinate, exact homeland, and migration-path evidence are unavailable in this fixture and are not inferred.

ancestryScopeSummary.autosomal: Autosomal ancestry can provide broad reference-panel similarity when a model is supplied; this fixture does not supply calibrated percentages.
ancestryScopeSummary.mapContext: A map-style label can visualize broad context, but it should not be treated as a literal coordinate or fixed identity label.

whatThisDoesNotMean: This is not an exact ethnicity percentage.
